common.searchHint: Chọọ site na aha peeji, isiokwu, ma ọ bụ ụzọ. Jiri igodo akụ iji họrọ, Tinye iji mepee.
common.searchTryDifferent: Gbalịa jiri ajụjụ ndị dị mkpirikpi, okwu ndị yiri ibe ha, ma ọ bụ okwu ndị ọzọ mee ihe.

home.heroSubtitle: Ebe agụmakwụkwọ mepere emepe maka Zcash
home.heroDescription: Mụta maka teknụzụ nzuzo Zcash, nyochaa ihe ngosi mmekọrịta, ma nye aka na gburugburu ebe obibi
home.description: ZecHub bụ ebe agụmakwụkwọ nke obodo na-eduzi maka Zcash cryptocurrency (ZEC). Zcash bụ ego dijitalụ na-enye nkwụsi ike na-eguzogide, nchekwa & ịkwụ ụgwọ nkeonwe. Zcash Blockchain na-eji zk-snarks 'nyocha' dị elu nke na-anaghị achọ Ntọala tụkwasịrị obi mgbe emelitere netwọk NU5 na 2022.
home.exploreEcosystem: Na-enyocha Ihe Ndị Dị n'Eluigwe na Ala

startHere.title: Malite Ebe a
startHere.content: Chọpụta ihe Zcash bụ na ZEC jiri ikpe

pickWallet.title: Họrọ obere akpa ego
pickWallet.content: Wallets na-enye gị ohere ịnata ma jiri Zcash na nzuzo. Ụfọdụ na-akwado akwụkwọ ozi ezoro ezo

resources.title: Akụrụngwa Zcash
resources.content: Nke a bụ ntuziaka ndị na-enyere ndị ọrụ aka ịghọta Zcash Full Nodes, zk-SNARKs na ndị ọzọ

whatIsZcash.title: Gịnị bụ Zcash?
whatIsZcash.description: It is an open-source, blockchain ledger that features a sophisticated zero-knowledge proving system. It specializes in offering a higher standard of privacy through its proving system preserving confidentiality of transaction metadata. At its core, Zcash is private data ownership that is permissionlessly transferred when transactions are made.

zcashMe.title: Zcash.me
zcashMe.description: Zcash.Me bụ akwụkwọ ndekọ aha ọha nke ndị ọrụ Zcash na-egosipụta ozi nzuzo, ọkwa, na ndị ọrụ enyocha. Jikọọ, nyochaa, ma soro ndị obodo Zcash nwee mmekọrịta.

globalAmbassadors.title: Ndị nnọchi anya Zcash Global
globalAmbassadors.description: Ndị nnọchi anya Zcash Global bụ ndị isi obodo raara onwe ha nye na-akwalite nnabata cryptocurrency na agụmakwụkwọ na-elekwasị anya na nzuzo n'ụwa niile. Onye ọ bụla na-ekwuchitere ọrụ na-etinye uche na iwulite mmata na itinye aka na mpaghara ha.

newsletter.title: Akwụkwọ Akụkọ E Chebere
newsletter.description: Subscribe using your Unified Address to get shielded access to Zcash Ecosystem Updates & Network Stats direct to your wallet!

free2z.title: Free2Z
free2z.description: Free2Z bụ usoro mmekọrịta mmadụ na ibe ya nke Zcash kwadoro. Site na onyinye ndị ọgbọ, mmemme ịkekọrịta ego, ngwa ọrụ okike dị elu na nnukwu obodo zuru ụwa ọnụ n'ịntanetị.

payWithZcash.title: Jiri Zcash kwụọ ụgwọ
payWithZcash.description: Ebe nrụọrụ weebụ a bụ azịza nye ajụjụ: Ebee ka m nwere ike iji Zcash kwụọ ụgwọ? Ndepụta ahụ bụ n'efu iji. Ihe ndị edepụtara bụ maka ebumnuche ozi naanị, ọ bụghị nkwado nke ụdị ọ bụla. Nwee obi ụtọ!

footer.description: Ebe agụmakwụkwọ mepere emepe maka Zcash

visualizer.title: Ndị na-ahụ maka Zcash
visualizer.description: Ngwá ọrụ agụmakwụkwọ mmekọrịta iji ghọta teknụzụ nzuzo Zcash, akụrụngwa, na ihe akaebe nke ihe ọmụma efu
visualizer.basicDescription: Echiche ndị bụ isi na njirimara ndị dị mkpa nke Zcash
visualizer.advancedDescription: Deep technical dives na cryptography, nkwekọrịta, na akụrụngwa
visualizer.contributorsDescription: Ụzọ iji nye aka na gburugburu ebe obibi Zcash ma nweta ụgwọ ọrụ
visualizer.autoPlayNote: Ihe ngosi ọ bụla na-agba ọsọ na-akpaghị aka. Jiri njikwa ịnyagharịa ma ọ bụ kwụsịtụ.

dao.title: ZecHub DAO
dao.headerDescription: Ebe a na-emeghe ebe ndị otu obodo na-arụkọ ọrụ na ịmepụta, nyochaa, na ịkwalite ọdịnaya nke na-akwado usoro okike Zcash
beliefs: Agụmakwụkwọ kwesiri ịbụ nke mepere emepe ma nwee ike ịnweta ya n'ụwa niile
Ndị otu obodo nwere ikike inweta ZEC n'onwe ha
Mmekọrịta zuru ụwa ọnụ na-akpali ihe ọhụrụ

features.title: Mbụ Zcash Ecosystem DAO
features.description: ZecHub bụ onye ọsụ ụzọ na-achịkwa nchịkwa na mpaghara Zcash, yana ego a na-edebe n'ime ọdọ mmiri Zcash echekwara maka nzuzo kachasị.

features.title: Mmekọrịta Zuru Ụwa Ọnụ
features.description: Ndị nnọchi anya mba ụwa, ndị otu Community Grants, na ndị ọkachamara obodo na-agbakọ aka iduzi ụzọ agụmakwụkwọ Zcash na Teknụzụ Nzuzo.

features.title: Nchịkọta SubDAO
features.description: Otu ọ bụla nwere ike ịmepụta SubDAOs iji mepụta ọrụ, mepụta atụmatụ, ma ọ bụ rịọ nkwụghachi azụ site na DAO DAO modul.

dao.governanceDescription: Ihe niile DAO na-atụ aro bụ ọha na eze na nke doro anya. Onye ọ bụla nwere ike ịmepụta atụmatụ ịtụ vootu. Na nkwado nke nghọta obodo, ZecHub DAO biputere atụmatụ ọchịchị niile na Zcash Community Forum Zec Hub Governance thread.
dao.pastProposals: Aro Ndị E Mere n'Oge Gara Aga

newsletter.title: Akwụkwọ akụkọ
newsletter.description: Nọgide na-emelite na akụkọ Zcash kachasị ọhụrụ

wallets.title: Akpa ego. ZecHub
wallets.noData: Enweghị data ma ọ bụ faịlụ ezighi ezi

dex.title: Mgbasa Ozi Na-enweghị Nkọwa
dex.subtitle: ZecHub anaghị akwado ọrụ Decentralized Exchange ọ bụla, biko mee nyocha nke gị.

exchanges.Near-intents: Mgbanwe ngwa ngwa na nkwado nke NEAR. Mee nkwụnye ego, ree, gbanwee gụnyere ewu ewu TRUMP, MELANIA, BERA na ndị ọzọ memes
exchanges.Nativeswap: Native Cross-Chain Trading Without Barriers via Maya Protocol. Azụmahịa na-aga n'ihu na-enweghị akwa ma ọ bụ ihe nkedo - nwee ụlọ ọrụ ụgwọ dị ala na njikwa akụ zuru ezu.
exchanges.Firo DEX: Ntinye ego na-enweghị ntụkwasị obi site na iji atomic swaps na FiroDEX!.
exchanges.LeoDEX: Otu interface mgbanwe crypto crosschain maka Maya Protocol, Thorchain, ChainFlip na Rango. BTC, ETH, RUNE, DASH, LTC & More
exchanges.Bison Wallet: Na-ere ahịa crypto n'etiti ndị ọgbọ, enweghị ụgwọ azụmahịa, enweghị KYC.
exchanges.THORSwap: Cross-chain DEX nke THORChain kwadoro, na-eme ka ndị nwe obodo gbanwee n'etiti Bitcoin, Ethereum, na ihe ndị ọzọ dị mkpa na-enweghị akara ngosi.
exchanges.Router Protocol: Mkpokọta ngwugwu ngwugwu nke na-enye ohere ka akụ na data na-aga n'ihu na-ebufe n'etiti ọtụtụ blockchains.
exchanges.Peer: Mgbanwe nke ndị ọgbọ na-eme ka azụmahịa crypto na-aga n'ihu na nzuzo na njikwa onye ọrụ.
exchanges.RocketX: Ngwakọta ngwakọ DEX na-enyere aka ịgbagha agbagha n'ofe ọtụtụ blockchains na ụzọ kachasị mma na ọnụego asọmpi.
exchanges.THORChain: Decentralized Layer 1 cross-chain exchange. Gbanwee ihe onwunwe dị ka ZEC, BTC, na ETH ozugbo na-enweghị àkwà mmiri, ngwugwu ngwugwu, ma ọ bụ ndị na-etiti.
exchanges.Loofta: Non-custodial onwe ugwo na swap n'elu ikpo okwu. Zipu ma nata crypto na nzuzo gafee agbụ, na Zcash dị ka nhazi nhazi maka ịkwalite nzuzo ego.

hackathon.title: ZecHub Hackathon
hackathon.heroIntro: Wụpụta n'akụkụ ise, site na infra ruo egwuregwu, wee dekọọ ma gosipụta ọrụ gị.
hackathon.countdownTimeUntilClose: Oge ruo mgbe a ga-emechi akwụkwọ
hackathon.endedNote: Oge hackathon a agwụla, ekele dịrị ndị niile sonyere na ya.
hackathon.tracksIntro: Kwekọrịta oru ngo gị na egwu maka nghọta mgbe ị nyefere, ndị ikpe na obodo na-eji ha eme nchọgharị na ndenye.

infrastructure.description: ZSA GUI, Node Launcher, Zallet web dashboard wdg.

games.description: Wiki Isiokwu egwuregwu yiri catfishing.net, ZEC Poker, Battleship wdg.

frost.description: Akpa ego na-edebanye aha, ZEC Escrow Shielded, Nkwado Ọha na Ọha

zcashLogin.name: Zcash Nbanye
zcashLogin.description: Nkwado na njirimara nke na-eji Zcash primitives maka ịbanye ma ọ bụ ịnweta.

accounting.name: Akwụkwọ ndekọ ego
accounting.description: Akụkọ, usoro ọrụ maka ndị otu na-ejikwa ZEC, usoro njikwa ịkwụ ụgwọ.

hackathon.prizePoolDesc: Wụpụta, nyefee, ma sọọ mpi maka ihe nrite obodo.

quickStart.title: ZecHub Onye Mmepụta Mmalite Ọsọ
quickStart.description: Chọta ngwaọrụ ndị dị mkpa, ntụaka, na usoro nhazi maka iwulite na Zcash.

hackathon.rulesDesc: Mee ka ihe ndị ị na-ede bụrụ ndị ezi uche dị na ha, meekwa ka ọ dịrị gị mfe ịtụle ha.

rules.mainnet: Ihe oru ngo ga-emekọrịta ihe na netwọkụ Zcash.
rules.oneProject: Ndị otu nwere ike itinye naanị otu ọrụ ikpeazụ maka otu otu.
rules.docs: Nkwupụta niile ga-agụnye akwụkwọ doro anya maka nhazi na ojiji.
rules.respect: Na-asọpụrụ nzuzo, nchekwa, na ụkpụrụ nduzi obodo na koodu na ọdịnaya.

hackathon.faqDesc: Azịza ọsọ ọsọ tupu ị banye n'ime.

whoCanParticipate.question: Ole ndị nwere ike isonye?
whoCanParticipate.answer: Onye ọ bụla nwere ike isonyere: ndị mmepe, ndị na-emepụta ihe na ndị otu multidisciplinary.

validSubmission.question: Gịnị ka ihe e nyere n'iwu kwesịrị ịgụnye?
validSubmission.answer: Ihe ngosi nke na-arụ ọrụ, ihe ngosi vidiyo, akwụkwọ ndị bụ isi, na nkọwa nke otu o si eji netwọk Zcash.

whereSubmit.question: Ebee ka anyị na-eziga ọrụ?
whereSubmit.answer: Kekọrịta ihe ngosi vidiyo gị na Zcash Global Discord ma tinye ebe nchekwa ma ọ bụ njikọ ngosi ọ bụla dị mkpa.

winnersSelected.question: Olee otú e si ahọpụta ndị mmeri?
winnersSelected.answer: A na-agba usoro obodo ọha na eze site na ọwa ZecHub DAO mgbe ntinye akwụkwọ mechiri.

whatTracks.question: Gịnị bụ ihe ndị a?
whatTracks.answer: Isiokwu nke hackathon a bụ Akụrụngwa, Egwuregwu, FROST, Nbanye Zcash, na Akaụntụ. Họrọ egwu nke kachasị dabara na iwu gị, ị ka nwere ike itinye ọrụ akọwapụtara n'ime egwu.

hackathon.submitIntro: Soro usoro ise a iji mee ka ọrụ gị site n'echiche gaa na ntinye aka.

build.title: Wụpụta ọrụ gị
build.description: Mepụta ihe na-arụ ọrụ nke na-emekọrịta ihe na Zcash mainnet. Họrọ egwu ma debe ndekọ mmepe ka ị na-aga.

record.title: Dee ihe ngosi vidio
record.description: Jide obere njem na-egosi ọrụ gị n'ọrụ. Kọwaa nke ọma ihe ọ na-eme na otu o si eji netwọk Zcash.

document.title: Dee ihe ndị ị na- eme n" akwụkwọ
document.description: Dee akwụkwọ README na ntuziaka ntọala, ihe eji eme ihe, na ikikere isi mmalite gị. Gbanye ihe niile n'ebe ọha na eze GitHub.

upload.title: Bulite koodu gị
upload.descSuffix: na GitHub ka obodo wee nyochaa ọrụ gị.

share.title: Ikere Òkè n'Eseokwu
share.description: Bipute ihe ngosi vidiyo gị na Zcash Global Discord na njikọ gị na njikọ ngosi tupu July 15, 2026 (UTC).

hackathon.deadlinePrefix: A ga-eziga ozi niile na Discord site na
hackathon.deadlineSuffix: A na-ahọpụta ndị mmeri site na ntuli aka ọha na eze na ZecHub DAO ọwa obere oge mgbe ntinye akwụkwọ mechiri.
hackathon.previousIntro: Na-agagharị na mbụ ZecHub hackathon na-ewu site na mbipụta. Kaadị ọrụ ọ bụla jikọtara ya na folda GitHub maka koodu, ndetu, na demos ebe dị.
hackathon.errorCouldNotLoad: Enweghi ike ibudata ndepụta ọrụ ndụ
hackathon.errorShowingSaved: Igosi ndepụta ọrụ hackathon gara aga echekwara kama.
hackathon.noProjects: Enweghị nchekwa ọrụ laghachiri. Mepee osisi repo iji nyochaa usoro.
hackathon.projectsArchivedOne: {count} oru ngo archived site na mbipụta a.
hackathon.projectsArchivedMany: {count} oru ngo echekwara site na mbipụta a.
hackathon.needHelpDesc: Zcash Global Discord bụ ebe kachasị mma maka iwulite ajụjụ, ndụmọdụ infra, na mkparịta ụka hackathon.

popup.subtitle: Wụpụta ngwa nzuzo nke mbụ na Zcash. Na-asọ mpi maka ihe nrite, nweta ZEC, ma kpụzie ọdịnihu nke nnwere onwe ego.

developers.title: Zcash Onye Mmepụta Akụrụngwa

cards.learnContent: Nyochaa akwụkwọ gọọmentị ma mụta ihe ndị bụ isi nke teknụzụ Zcash.
cards.tutorialsTitle: Mụta Ihe Site n'Ihe Mmụta Ndị E Nwere
cards.tutorialsContent: Soro nkuzi nzọụkwụ site na nzọụkwụ iji wuo na Zcash, site na ịmepụta wallets iji jikọta Zcash n'ime ngwa gị.
cards.quickStartContent: Bilie ma na-agba ọsọ na mmepe Zcash ngwa ngwa. Mụta ntinye, nhazi, na ọrụ ndị bụ isi.

introLinks.introToZcashDesc: Mụta maka Zcash, akụkọ ya, na ụkpụrụ ya.
introLinks.introToZecDesc: Chọpụta ihe eji eme ihe na uru nke ZEC, Zcash native cryptocurrency.
introLinks.introToZebraDesc: Ịghọta otú Zebra si enye ike netwọk Zcash site na mmejuputa nke dabeere na Rust
introLinks.introToLightwalletdDesc: Ịghọta ọrụ lightwalletd a scalable server e dere na Go nke na-arụ ọrụ nke ọma na-eje ozi kọmpat blockchain data ka Zcash ìhè ahịa site gRPC.
introLinks.zalletBookDesc: Okwu Mmalite na Zallet, obere akpa Zcash zuru oke nke edere na Rust ma hazie dị ka onye nnọchi maka obere akpa zcashd.
introLinks.developerResourcesDesc: Njikọ na Zcash na akwụkwọ ndị ọzọ gbasara teknụzụ.

fundamentalsLinks.addressEncodingDesc: Mụta etu adreesị Zcash na igodo si ede ya.
fundamentalsLinks.transactionsDesc: Ghọta etu azụmahịa si arụ ọrụ na Zcash.
fundamentalsLinks.feesDesc: Mụta banyere ego ole a na-akwụ ndị na-azụ ahịa nakwa otú e si agụ ha.
fundamentalsLinks.nodesZcashdDesc: Hazie ma jikwaa oghere Zcash site na iji zcashd.
fundamentalsLinks.nodesZebradDesc: Nyochaa Zebra, mmejuputa uzo ozo nke Zcash.
fundamentalsLinks.lightwalletServersDesc: Mụta maka lightwalletd, ihe nkesa obere akpa Zcash dị mfe.
fundamentalsLinks.blockExplorersDesc: Nyochaa Zcash blockchains na-eji ndị na-enyocha ihe.
fundamentalsLinks.shadeAgentDesc: Mụta maka Shade Agents - ndị ọrụ AI mbụ nwere onwe ha na NEAR - nke ejiri TEEs echekwa na Decentralized Chain Signatures iji jikwaa akụ, nweta LLMs, ma mepụta azụmahịa multichain n'adabereghị.

advancedLinks.introToStackDesc: Ghọta ihe owuwu na akụrụngwa nke Zcash stack.
advancedLinks.zecDevDesc: N'ebe a, ị ga-ahụ oru ngo, ihe onwunwe na ngwaọrụ ndị e mepụtara ma nọgide na-enwe n'ọnọdụ nke (Zcash) Developer Relations Engineer grant.
advancedLinks.introToZingolibDesc: Ịghọta ihe nchekwa zingolib a Rust-based API na CLI maka imekọrịta na zcashd site na Lightwalletd.
advancedLinks.webZjsDesc: Ọbá akwụkwọ JavaScript/TypeScript maka iwulite ngwa weebụ na-akwado Zcash site na iji WebAssembly.
advancedLinks.noirWalletSdkDesc: TypeScript SDK na ihe atụ dApp maka ijikọta ngwa Zcash na ndọtị ihe nchọgharị Noir Wallet.
advancedLinks.zcashIkaDesc: Nchebe igodo nkewa maka Zcash na ndị ọrụ multi-chain site na 2PC-MPC. Iwu mmefu n'elu, nkwenye nzuzo, ZIP 244 onye na-ewu azụmahịa.
advancedLinks.developmentGuidelinesDesc: Soro usoro kachasị mma maka mmepe na Zcash.
advancedLinks.arboristCallsDesc: Zcash Arborist Calls bụ nzukọ mmepe usoro kwa izu na-elekwasị anya na nsuso usoro ntinye usoro na-abịanụ, nsogbu mmejuputa nkwekọrịta, na nyocha usoro.

developers.feedbackTitle: Akwụkwọ a ò nyeere gị aka?
developers.feedbackHelpful: Daalụ maka nzaghachi gị! Mee ka ibe a ka mma site n'ịza ajụjụ ole na ole. Ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ enyemaka, ị nwere ike ịkpọtụrụ obodo na anyị
developers.feedbackNotHelpful: Ọ dị m nwute ịnụ nke ahụ. Biko mee ka anyị mara etu anyị nwere ike isi melite ibe a. Ị nwere ike ịkpọtụrụ ndị obodo na anyị

sybil.problemDesc: N'ime netwọkụ ebe ịtụ vootu na-ekpebi eziokwu, onye na-awakpo nwere ike ịmepụta ọtụtụ nde njirimara adịgboroja iji merie ndị otu ziri ezi.
sybil.realUsers: 3 Ndị Na-eji Ya Eme Ihe n'Ezie
sybil.solutionTitle: Otu Zcash si egbochi mwakpo Sybil
sybil.powDesc: Ngwuputa na-achọ ezigbo akụrụngwa kọmputa. Ịmepụta njirimara adịgboroja anaghị enyekwu ikike ịtụ vootu  naanị ezigbo ọrụ na-eme.
sybil.costDesc: Ịwakpo netwọk chọrọ nnukwu ego na ngwaike na ọkụ eletrik, na-eme ka mwakpo na-enweghị isi.
sybil.insightDesc: Sybil iguzogide na-ejikọta ikike ịtụ vootu na ụkọ ego (kọmputa, osisi) kama ịbụ njirimara ndị e mepụtara ngwa ngwa.

saplingKey.spendingKeyDesc: Isi ihe nzuzo nke imefu ego
saplingKey.keyFeatureTitle: Isi Ihe Ndị E Ji Mara Ya
saplingKey.keyFeatureDesc: Mepụta adreesị pụrụ iche na-enweghị njedebe site na otu igodo

difficulty.adjustmentTitle: Ime Mgbanwe Mgbe O Siiri M Ike
difficulty.summary: Netwọk ahụ na-agbanwe nsogbu nke igwupụta akụ na-akpaghị aka iji nọgide na-enwe oge nkwụsị oge, n'agbanyeghị ole ndị na-egwupụta ego na-asọmpi.

paymentProcessors.title: Ndị na-arụ ọrụ ịkwụ ụgwọ. ZecHub
paymentProcessors.noData: Enweghị data ma ọ bụ faịlụ ezighi ezi

developersQuickStart.heroSubtitle: Bilie ma na-agba ọsọ na mmepe Zcash Họrọ nchịkọta gị ma soro ntuziaka ahụ.
developersQuickStart.noteDownloadsBlockchain: Mbụ na-agba ọsọ na-ebudata blockchain dum (~ 250 GB)
developersQuickStart.noteInitialSync: Mmekọrịta mbụ nwere ike were ọtụtụ awa
developersQuickStart.noteKeepSecure: Debe zebrad.toml gị n'ebe dị nchebe na nzuzo
developersQuickStart.lightwalletdInfo: bụ ihe nkesa nke na-enye interface dị mfe na Zcash blockchain, nke e mere maka obere akpa mkpanaka na desktọọpụ nke anaghị achọ ịgba ọsọ zuru oke.
developersQuickStart.zainoInfo: bụ Rust-based indexer maka Zcash blockchain. Ọ na-eje ozi ma ndị ahịa ọkụ (wallets ndị na-adịghị echekwa akụkọ ihe mere eme zuru ezu) na ndị ahịa zuru oke / ndị nchọpụta ngọngọ, na-enye ohere ịnweta agbụ agbụ, agbụ kachasị mma na-abụghị nke ikpeazụ, na mempool.
developersQuickStart.zingoCliInfo: bụ iwu-akara lightwalletd-proxy onye ahịa wuru na Rust. Nwepụta bụ ugbu a nwa oge  ntuziaka a na-ekpuchi nchịkọta site na isi iyi.
developersQuickStart.zingoSyncWarning: Nke a ga-eme nhazi zuru oke na nke mbụ, yiri lightwalletd.

governanceHowto.pageSubtitle: Ntuziaka zuru ezu maka isonye na ọchịchị ZecHub DAO
governanceHowto.firstStepsDesc: Kwadebe maka isonye na ọchịchị DAO
governanceHowto.draftProposalDesc: Hazie atụmatụ gị ma kwadebe ya maka itinye akwụkwọ
governanceHowto.installKeplrDesc: Hazie obere akpa Keplr gị iji soro DAO na-emekọrịta ihe
governanceHowto.acquireJunoDesc: Nweta akara ngosi JUNO iji soro nkwekọrịta daodao nwee mmekọrịta. Kpọtụrụ ndị otu isi maka enyemaka.
governanceHowto.viewOpenProposalsDesc: Lelee atụmatụ ndị dị ugbu a na ohere ịtụ vootu
governanceHowto.formatNote: Ọdịdị: Enwere ike ide akwụkwọ na .Md ma ọ bụ .txt
governanceHowto.recommendedStructure: Nhazi usoro anọ a tụrụ aro:
governanceHowto.stageBackground: Ihe Ndị Mere Tupu E Mee Ya
governanceHowto.stageBackgroundDesc: Nye ụfọdụ akụkọ ihe mere eme nke isiokwu / ọrụ ahụ
governanceHowto.stageWhyDesc: Kwuo ihe mere i ji chọọ ịlụ ya.
governanceHowto.stageProposalDesc: N'ụzọ doro anya, kọwaa atụmatụ gị n'ụzọ zuru ezu
governanceHowto.stageActionDesc: Ihe na-eme mgbe ntuli aka gara nke ọma - nwere ike inye usoro iheomume
governanceHowto.getFeedbackDesc: Kekọrịta ihe odide gị na ọwa ZecHub #proposals na Discord maka nzaghachi mbụ
governanceHowto.walkthroughDesc: Lelee njem zuru ezu banyere otu esi ede ma hazie atụmatụ
governanceHowto.postInDiscordDesc: Kekọrịta atụmatụ ikpeazụ gị na #proposals ma tinye mkpado @core-team
governanceHowto.submitOnPortalDesc: Jiri saịtị ntuli aka ZecHub mepụta atụmatụ gị
governanceHowto.loginNote: ️ Ịkwesịrị ịbanye na Keplr ma ọ bụ KeplR Mobile

research.foundationsSeriesCardDescription: Isiokwu ndị bụ isi gbasara azụmahịa echedoro, ụdị nzuzo, na nhazi usoro.
research.articlesHeading: Isiokwu Ndị E Ji Eme Nchọpụta
research.articlesSubheading: Isiokwu na ndetu site na obodo ZecHub.
research.foundationsSeriesDescription: Nchịkọta nke isiokwu ntọala na-ekpuchi azụmahịa Zcash echekwara, ụdị nzuzo, nhazi usoro, na isi echiche nke na-akwado netwọkụ ahụ.

pages.browseSidebar: Chọgharịa isiokwu ndị ahụ site na iji sidebar dị n'aka ekpe

zcashGlobalAmbassadors.title: Ndị nnọchi anya Zcash Global
zcashGlobalAmbassadors.description: Ndị nnọchi anya Zcash Global bụ ndị isi obodo raara onwe ha nye na-akwalite nnabata cryptocurrency na agụmakwụkwọ na-elekwasị anya na nzuzo n'ụwa niile. Onye ọ bụla na-ekwuchitere ọrụ na-etinye uche na iwulite mmata na itinye aka na mpaghara ha.
zcashGlobalAmbassadors.activeProjectsHeading: Ọrụ Ndị Nnọchiteanya Ụwa Na-arụsi Ọrụ Ike
zcashGlobalAmbassadors.projectSiteLabel: Ebe E Wuru Ụlọ Ọrụ Ahụ
zcashGlobalAmbassadors.footerInfo: Zcash Global Ambassadors program na-akwado atụmatụ ndị obodo na-eduzi iji kwalite nnabata teknụzụ na-elekwasị anya na nzuzo. Onye ọ bụla onye nnọchi anya ọrụ na-arụ ọrụ n'adabereghị ma na-enye aka na gburugburu ebe obibi Zcash.
zcashGlobalAmbassadors.mapSubtitle: Nkwado Zcash nke ndị obodo na-eduzi n'ofe {count} obodo ndị na-arụ ọrụ.
zcashGlobalAmbassadors.loadError: Enweghi ike ibudata data onye nnọchi anya.

projects.Zcash Korea: Obodo Zcash na nkwado na Korea
projects.Zcash Russia: Obodo Zcash na nkwado na Russia
projects.Zcash Arabia: Obodo Zcash na nkwado na mpaghara na-asụ Arabic
projects.Zcash Brazil: Obodo Zcash na nkwado na Brazil
projects.Zcash Ghana: Obodo Zcash na nkwado na Ghana
projects.Zcash Español: Obodo Zcash na nkwado na mpaghara na-asụ Spanish
projects.Zcash Nigeria: Obodo Zcash na nkwado na Naijiria
projects.Zcash Ukraine: Obodo Zcash na nkwado na Ukraine
projects.Zcash Turkey: Obodo Zcash na nkwado na Turkey
projects.Zcash India: Obodo Zcash na nkwado na India
projects.Zcash East Africa: Zcash East Africa bụ nke a raara nye iji kwalite nzuzo dijitalụ, nnwere onwe ego, na ihe ọhụrụ nke blockchain site na agụmakwụkwọ, mmemme obodo, ụlọ ọrụ teknụzụ, na mmepe gburugburu ebe obibi. Ebumnuche ahụ bụ imepụta mpaghara mpaghara ebe ndị mmadụ nwere ike inyocha teknọzụ na-eme ka nzuzo dịkwuo elu, mụta banyere ihe akaebe ihe ọmụma efu, ma sonye na netwọkụ Zcash zuru ụwa ọnụ na-eto eto.
projects.Zcash South Africa: Nzuzo ️. Nnwere onwe. Zcash  Community maka mpaghara South Africa

newsletter.categoryEcosystem: Akụkọ Gbasara Ihe Ndị Dị n'Eluigwe na Ala
newsletter.invalidAddressInline: Adreesị ezighi ezi. Ọ ga-amalite site na "u" ma ọ bụ "z".
newsletter.doNotEditMemo: Edezila ihe edeturu na obere akpa gị.
newsletter.box1Desc: Nweta akụkọ gburugburu ebe obibi Zcash na ọnụọgụ netwọkụ ozugbo site na netwọkụ Zcash site na iji memos ezoro ezo.
newsletter.box2DescPre: Anyị na-ezipụ akwụkwọ akụkọ otu ugboro n'izu na ọtụtụ ndị nnata na otu azụmahịa echekwara site na iji
newsletter.box3Title: Otú Ị Ga-esi Nweta Ihe Ndị A Na-emelite
newsletter.box3DescPost: A na-eziga mmelite kwa izu na ntanetị. Ọ dịghị mkpa email.
newsletter.unsubscribePlaceholder: Enter your Unified Address to unsubscribe

aiAssistant.privacyNotice: A na-edozi ajụjụ site na OpenAI. Ekekọrịtala mkpụrụ okwu, igodo nzuzo, ma ọ bụ adreesị wallet.
aiAssistant.sensitiveWarning: Nke a yiri data akpa ego dị nro. Ekekọrịtala igodo nzuzo ma ọ bụ mkpụrụ okwu na ọrụ ọ bụla.
aiAssistant.inputPlaceholder: Jụọ ajụjụ... (Tinye iji zipu, Mgbanwe + Tinye maka ahịrị ọhụrụ)
aiAssistant.enterHint: Tinye iji zipu, Mgbanwe + Tinye maka ahịrị ọhụrụ
